message:
fix(events): fix AllOfTracker multi-match and add distributed session-scope tracking

Event stream: AllOfTracker::check() now satisfies multiple conditions
from a single event (was limited to first positional match). Correct
module/type doc comments to clarify live-bus vs storage-replay streams.

Distributed: add DistributedSequenceScopeState and session-scope
lifecycle management (register on connect, prune stale scopes via
Aggregator::remove_agent and SessionReplayGuard::remove). Canonical
session ID derivation and sender-session scoping with hash suffix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
